summary: The footage captures nighttime scenes on a snowy street illuminated by streetlights. Vehicles with headlights are traveling in both directions. Snowbanks line the sides of the road, and pedestrians can be seen walking along the sidewalks.

events_timeline.event: Multiple vehicles are traveling in both directions on a snowy street at night.

uncertainties: The identities of the vehicles cannot be determined.

risk_assessment.why: The primary concern is the snowy conditions which may affect traction and visibility.
